item.title: Github Pages and Pelican
item.description:
Category: DevOps Tags: pelican, travis-ci, github-pages Slug: github-pages-and-pelican Authors: Alex Kagno Summary: How to use Travis CI to publish a Pelican site automatically to Github Pages

A better write-up coming soon. I just want to test my CI/CD pipeline right now.

References

  1. Primary documentation
  2. Pelican Alchemy
  3. Pelican documenation
item.dc:creator: Alex Kagno
